parsed_artifacts.content:
module gray_counter #(
    parameter integer WIDTH = 4,
    parameter integer CLOCK_FREQ_MHZ = 200
) (
    input  logic             clk,
    input  logic             rst_n,
    input  logic             enable,
    input  logic             clear,
    output logic [WIDTH-1:0] gray_value,
    output logic [WIDTH-1:0] bin_value,
    output logic             done
);

    // SSOT keeps CLOCK_FREQ_MHZ as a top-level contract parameter.
    // Consume it in elaboration-time control to avoid unused warnings
    // without changing functional datapath behavior.
    generate
        if (CLOCK_FREQ_MHZ >= 0) begin : g_core
            gray_counter_core #(
                .WIDTH(WIDTH)
            ) u_gray_counter_core (
                .clk       (clk),
                .rst_n     (rst_n),
                .enable    (enable),
                .clear     (clear),
                .gray_value(gray_value),
                .bin_value (bin_value),
                .done      (done)
            );
        end else begin : g_core_unreachable
            gray_counter_core #(
                .WIDTH(WIDTH)
            ) u_gray_counter_core (
                .clk       (clk),
                .rst_n     (rst_n),
                .enable    (enable),
                .clear     (clear),
                .gray_value(gray_value),
                .bin_value (bin_value),
                .done      (done)
            );
        end
    endgenerate

endmodule
